missions.name: The Longer Ledger
missions.description: The cargo broker at Nexus Prime called you back. Not for another haul. This is the kind of conversation he does not have with pilots who have not run a clean delivery first. He wants to show you a different part of the books.
missions.hint: Find Odom at the Nexus Prime cargo office and hear what he has to say about the longer ledger.
missions.discovery_text: Odom flagged me down after the iron ore job. Said he had something to show me. Not freight. The other side of the book.

objectives.description: Talk to Odom at Nexus Prime about the longer ledger
